agentLog.action: LLM: Risk-on session with S&P futures +0.54% and gold surging +1.03% signals a bifurcated market — equities bid but safe-haven demand persists, suggesting underlying uncertainty. Regime is CHOPPY (VIX ~20), so selectivity is paramount; social buzz on mega-caps is noise, not catalyst. V9 model strongly favors value/cyclicals (semis, pharma, energy) over growth/tech — align entries accordingly.
Regime: NEUTRAL | Signal: none | Execution: none

LLM: Risk-on sentiment with S&P futures +0.54% and gold surging +1.03% signals a bifurcated market: equity bulls pressing highs while gold's move hints at underlying macro uncertainty. CHOPPY regime with VIX near 20 means selectivity is critical — the V9 model is screaming AVOID on mega-cap tech (MSFT, AMZN, TSLA, NVDA all Q4-Q5), while highest-conviction longs cluster in semis, industrials, healthcare, and energy. No earnings catalyst near-term, so sector rotation and technical setups drive the edge.
